use_cases: Displaying project overview with name, description, and visual branding icon
Showing team member roster with avatars and real-time online status indicators
Tracking milestone progress with completion status and due date countdowns
Providing at-a-glance project status for dashboard interfaces
Enabling project managers to monitor team availability and task completion
ai_summary: A glass-morphism styled project pulse tracker card component displaying project metadata, team member status (online/busy/offline), and milestone progress. Features a two-column responsive layout with backdrop blur effects and dark mode support. Designed for dashboard integration to give teams a consolidated view of project health, team availability, and upcoming deadlines.
